system	prompt	[Init] Session boot
user	prompt	What's the weather
agent	response	let me check
agent	tool_result	72F sunny
user	tool_result	(user paste of raw data)	with	extra	tabs
system	response	[Audit log] action completed
agent	prompt	[Self-reflection] I should be careful

COUNT_BILLABLE
COUNT_REAL_USER
COUNT_MODEL_INPUT
AUDIT_AUTHOR 1
AUDIT_AUTHOR 7
REBUILD_CONVERSATION
COUNT_BILLABLE
